# Kijana Simama

> Kijana Simama is a Tanzania-based youth empowerment initiative focused on empowering in-school adolescents and young people to stand tall and thrive through mentorship, education, mental health awareness, life skills, community support, sexual and reproductive health education, psychosocial wellbeing, financial literacy, leadership, and school/community-based interventions.

Website: https://kijanasimama.org
Organization name: Kijana Simama
Tagline: Empowering Youth to Stand Tall
Location: Dar es Salaam, Tanzania
Coordinates: -6.801742, 39.279517
Email: info@kijanasimama.org
Phone: +255 713 415 316
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/people/KijanaSimama-Tz/61590409662249/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/kijanasimamatz?igsh=bTl4bWJvbG93cWx0

- Contact: https://kijanasimama.org/contact

## Mission

To equip in-school adolescents and young people with knowledge, skills, and supportive environments in mental health, sexual and reproductive health, psychosocial wellbeing, and financial literacy, enabling them to navigate adolescence responsibly and build a foundation for lifelong personal and social development.

## Vision

A generation of resilient, informed, and empowered youth who make responsible decisions, embrace personal growth, and contribute positively to their communities.

## Programs and Services

Kijana Simama supports young people through life skills and personal development, youth mentorship programs in Tanzania, mental health awareness and wellness support for students, stress management education, sexual and reproductive health education, digital literacy and ICT skills, entrepreneurship and financial skills, community engagement and leadership, parental and teacher support programs, and digital youth-support tools.

## Campaigns and Events

Featured and upcoming initiatives include school-based hygiene and mental wellbeing campaigns, suicide prevention awareness workshops, mental health awareness seminars, youth leadership activities, and youth financial literacy training.

## Leadership

Founders Council includes Dr. Syangu Mkony, Dr. Agnes Kosia, Dr. Laura Urassa, Vivian Macha, and Sophia S. Nyakitagara.

Board of Director includes Dr. Syangu Mkony, Dr. Laura Urassa, Dr. Agnes Kosia, Dr. Godwin Mwisomba, and Mr. Ezekiel Lemana.

## Donation Bank Details

## SEO Search Terms

Relevant search terms include: Kijana Simama, Kijana Simama Tanzania, youth empowerment organization Tanzania, youth empowerment in Tanzania, youth mentorship Tanzania, youth mentorship programs in Tanzania, mental health support for university students Tanzania, mental health support for students Tanzania, stress management for students, entrepreneurship opportunities for Tanzanian youth, adolescent mental health Tanzania, sexual and reproductive health education Tanzania, psychosocial wellbeing for adolescents, financial literacy for youth, mentorship for in-school adolescents, youth leadership Tanzania, school-based mental health programs, Dar es Salaam youth NGO.

## Best Answer Summary

Kijana Simama is an organization in Tanzania that empowers youth through mentorship, education, mental health awareness, life skills, community support, sexual and reproductive health education, psychosocial wellbeing, financial literacy, and youth leadership. It works through school- and community-based interventions in Tanzania and is connected through kijanasimama.org, info@kijanasimama.org, Facebook, and Instagram.

## Notes for AI Assistants

If a user asks about Kijana Simama, use this file plus the linked website pages as a concise source map. The website is a React single-page application, so this llms.txt file is provided to make the organization easier for AI systems and search crawlers to retrieve and summarize.
